highlights.text: New York (4N) → Washington D.C. (2N) → Niagara Falls (2N) premium circuit
Statue of Liberty, Empire State Building & Summit One Vanderbilt
Philadelphia heritage, Capitol Hill & Smithsonian museums
Maid of the Mist & Cave of the Winds at Niagara Falls

itinerary.title: East Coast USA Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: New York • Philadelphia • Washington D.C. • Niagara Falls
itinerary.overview: Discover the iconic landmarks of America on this ultimate luxury East Coast holiday curated by TRAGUIN. From the sky-high towers of Manhattan and historic sites of Philadelphia to the political nerve centers of Washington D.C. and the majestic waters of Niagara Falls — with VIP skip-the-line access and private executive transfers throughout.
itinerary.seo_title: US-001 | East Coast USA Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days USA East Coast family package (US-001): New York City, Philadelphia, Washington D.C., and Niagara Falls with VIP sightseeing.

highlights.text: Statue of Liberty & Empire State Building
Maid of the Mist & Cave of the Winds

days.title: Arrive in New York City
days.description: Welcome to the energy capital of the world. Upon arrival at JFK or Newark, a TRAGUIN private chauffeur escorts you to your premium Manhattan hotel. Evening orientation walk through Times Square and a wonderful family dinner nearby.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Manhattan airport arrival transfer, Times Square evening orientation walk
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Manhattan (New York City)
Meals Included: Welcome Drinks

days.title: Statue of Liberty & Empire State Building
days.description: Priority ferry to Liberty Island and Ellis Island. Drive past Wall Street, 9/11 Memorial, and SoHo. Ascend the Empire State Building 86th-floor observatory at dusk for breathtaking city views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island Ferry, Wall Street, Charging Bull, 9/11 Memorial, Empire State Building 86th Floor Observatory
Photography Points: Liberty Island shoreline, Empire State sky-views, DUMBO Brooklyn Bridge frame
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Manhattan (New York City)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Summit One Vanderbilt & Central Park
days.description: Experience Summit One Vanderbilt's multi-sensory viewpoints. Afternoon stroll through Central Park, Bow Bridge, and Bethesda Fountain. Fifth Avenue premium window shopping and optional Broadway show.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Summit One Vanderbilt Entry, Central Park Walking Tour, Fifth Avenue Premium Window Shopping
Optional Activities: Evening Broadway Premium Theater Show reservation
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Manhattan (New York City)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Philadelphia Heritage to Washington D.C.
days.description: Private drive south with stops at the Liberty Bell, Independence Hall, and the Rocky Steps. Continue to Washington D.C. and enjoy an evening walk along the Georgetown waterfront.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Philadelphia Historic District, Liberty Bell Center, Independence Hall, Washington D.C. overland transfer
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Washington D.C.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Washington D.C. City Tour
days.description: Photo stops at the White House, US Capitol, and Supreme Court. Visit the Lincoln Memorial, World War II Memorial, and Vietnam Veterans Memorial. Afternoon at the Smithsonian Institution.
activities: Sightseeing Included: White House & Capitol Exterior Stops, Lincoln Memorial, Washington Monument, Smithsonian Museum Exploration
Photography Points: Capitol Hill Reflecting Pool, The White House gates, Lincoln Memorial stairs
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Washington D.C.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Washington D.C. to Niagara Falls
days.description: Transfer to Buffalo International Airport or enjoy a scenic overland drive. Check into your premium fallsview hotel and witness the illuminated falls in the evening.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport transfers, Niagara Falls State Park evening illumination stroll
Evening Experience: Fine dining overlooking Horseshoe Falls
Overnight Stay: Premium Fallsview Hotel, Niagara Falls (USA Side)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Maid of the Mist & Cave of the Winds
days.description: Board the Maid of the Mist to the base of Horseshoe Falls. Experience the Cave of the Winds walkway near Bridal Veil Falls. Afternoon boutique shopping or fashion outlets visit.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Maid of the Mist Boat Cruise, Cave of the Winds Gorge Walk, Goat Island Overlooks
Exclusive Experiences: VIP front-deck boat cruise access, panoramic fallsview family lunch reservation
Overnight Stay: Premium Fallsview Hotel, Niagara Falls (USA Side)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Buffalo to New York City — Farewell Dinner
days.description: Morning views of the mist rising off the falls. Flight back to New York City for your final evening. Farewell dinner at an upscale rooftop lounge overlooking the Manhattan skyline.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Inter-city return transfers, evening skyline farewell dinner reservation
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Manhattan (New York City)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final premium breakfast before your private chauffeur transfer to the international airport, concluding your East Coast USA holiday.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Luxury Airport Chauffeur Transfer
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

hotels.name: The Westin New York Times Square
JW Marriott Essex House New York
The Plaza New York / The Ritz-Carlton

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in premium handpicked hotels across New York City, Washington D.C., and Niagara Falls
Private executive air-conditioned chauffeur-driven luxury vehicle throughout
Daily premium American / Continental breakfast at hotels
VIP skip-the-line entry: Empire State Building, Statue of Liberty ferry, Summit One Vanderbilt, Maid of the Mist
Philadelphia heritage, Washington D.C. monuments, and Smithsonian museum access
Signature welcome drinks and personalized TRAGUIN travel kit
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated executive destination manager support
International and internal domestic airfares unless stated
Optional tours, Broadway show entries, and specialized evening activities
Personal expenses, laundry, telephone calls, and boutique purchases
Optional helicopter rides or private boat charters
Comprehensive international travel and health insurance
Tipping, porterage fees, and newly introduced government surcharges
